# anthropic_external_keys (Data Source)

Lists all CMEK external keys in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_external_keys" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `external_keys` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--external_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--external_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `external_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `geo` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `provider_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--external_keys--provider_config))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--external_keys--provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `external_keys.provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String)
- `key_name` (String)
- `kms_arn` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `role_arn` (String)
- `tenant_id` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `vault_uri` (String)
